provisions.title: Process of Request for Export or Import of Timber and Non-timber Forest Products
provisions.content:
PROCESSES OF REQUEST
 FOR EXPORT OR IMPORT OF TIMBER AND NON-TIMBER FOREST PRODUCTS
There are 5 phases for the processes of request for export or import of timber and non-timber forest
products. The require timing for getting permission may vary according to nature of requests and the
completeness of submitted application form and supported documents.
 I. The Processes of Request for Export or Import Quota and Licenses
 Phase 1 Phase 2 Phase 3 Phase 4 Phase 5
 Submission of Consideration and Granting of Granting of Granting of
 Application Approval Export-Import Export-Import Export-Import
 by Forestry Quota License Transportation
 Administration Permit

 Phase 1 Submission of Application
 Client submits Application Form (AF) to the Forestry Administration (Ministry of
 Agriculture Forestry and Fisheries). While submitted, original AF, packing lists,
 invoices, buying-selling contracts, legal identity of client, power of attorney, and
 letter support legal sources of timber etc. are required.
 Phase 2 Consideration and Approval by Forestry Administrations
 Forestry Administration (FA) takes into consideration the submitted application,
 supported documents and gives comment for decision of MAFF. The MAFF will
 decide or further comment to the cabinet of Council of Ministers for final decision in
 accordance with laws and regulations.
 Phase 3 Granting of Export- Import Quota
 Quota for export or import will be granted by the cabinet of Council of Ministers
 and/or by MAFF. The quota validity is one year. When expiration, client may
 request for extension of its validity with reason to support the request.
 Phase 4 Granting of Export-Import License
 After receiving quota, client must submit request for export or import license
 according to quantity need to export or import each time. The export-import license
 will be issued by the Ministry of Commerce (MOC) and visa by head of FA.
 Phase 5 Granting of Export-Import Transportation Permit
 In order to transport products to and from ports of import or export, client must
 request and get transportation permit from FA before moving the products. The
 request of transportation permit must be made the same time as the request of
 export or import license.

 II. The Timber and Non-timber Forest Products allow for Export or Import
Timber and non-timber forest products allow export or import, prohibited products, and conditions of
export or import are stipulated in the Sub-decree, no. 131 GnRk>bk dated 28 November 2006 of the
Royal Government of Cambodia, on Timber and Non-timber Forest Products Allow for Export and
Import.

 (Unofficial Translation: Legal application will base on Cambodian language).
